name: AIIMS Jodhpur – DEO, Project Research Scientist – 2 Posts

basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Jodhpur Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for DEO, Project Research Scientist Posts
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Jodhpur (AIIMS Jodhpur) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of DEO, Project Research Scientist. Candidates with M.Sc, Ph.D, B.Sc Can attend Walkin. The Walk-in on 26-05-2026. For detailed information please visit AIIMS Jodhpur official website.

age_limit.age_details: Max 40 years for Scientist II, Max 30 years for Data Entry Operator

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree in science with experience or PhD for Scientist; Graduate/Post Graduate degree in Computer Sciences for Data Entry Operator.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 67,000/- +HRA 20% for Scientist II; Rs. 29,200/- (Consolidated) for Data Entry Operator.
